name: Pendulum
description: Bobs hanging from slender rods, caught mid-swing — every redraw releases them to sway springily to new angles.

code.style: --bob: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --rule: ( /* rod and bob share one emitted swing angle and a common pivot, so the pendulum stays rigid */ --swing: @r(-30, 30); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 49.4%; top: 6%; width: 1.2%; height: 42%; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--color1); opacity: 0.7; transform: rotate(calc(@var(--swing) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 50% 0%; transition: cubic-bezier(0.3, 1.4, 0.6, 1) 800ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 16%; left: 42%; top: 48%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bob); transform: rotate(calc(@var(--swing) * 1deg)); transform-origin: 50% -262.5%; transition: cubic-bezier(0.3, 1.4, 0.6, 1) 800ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
